title: Can taste bitter
summary: Can taste bitter.
detail: Normal tasting ability for bitterness. This makes turnip, cabbage, brussels sprouts, broccoli, and other cruciferous vegetables taste more interesting and less horribly bland. Coffee and dark beers also tastes more bitter. You can taste propylthiouracil (PROP), PTC, and related chemicals. On the other hand, you can't taste the unpleasant bitterness of the tropical fruit from the Bignay tree, it will taste sweet to you. You probably eat healthier.

title: Possibly unable to taste bitter in some foods
summary: Possibly unable to taste bitter in some foods.

That would make cabbage etc. taste horribly bland and boring. On the other hand, fruit from the tropical bignay tree would taste unpleasantly bitter to you instead of sweet. You might eat less healthily.
